message:
feat: add CLI LLM backend + fix standalone binary native addon crash

Two user-facing improvements:

1. CLI LLM backend (closes #37): Users can now set `provider: "cli"` and
   `cliCommand: "claude"` (or codex/gemini) to use installed CLI tools for
   reflection instead of requiring API keys. The CLI backend shells out to
   the tool, requests JSON output, and validates against the zod schema.
   Auto-detects available tools on PATH as a fallback provider.

2. Standalone binary fix (closes #38): The Bun-compiled standalone binary
   crashed because @xenova/transformers statically imports onnxruntime-node
   and sharp (native addons that can't be bundled). Added a postinstall
   patch that converts these to dynamic imports with graceful WASM fallback.
   Text embedding continues to work via onnxruntime-web (WASM); sharp is
   only needed for image pipelines which cm never uses.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -31,7 +31,8 @@
     "test:coverage": "bun test --coverage",
     "test:watch": "bun test --watch",
     "test:fast": "bun test test/*.fast.test.ts",
-    "test:ci": "bun test --timeout 60000"
+    "test:ci": "bun test --timeout 60000",
+    "postinstall": "node scripts/patch-standalone-deps.mjs"
   },
   "dependencies": {
     "@ai-sdk/amazon-bedrock": "^1.1.6",
